title: abutilon cornutum
intro: Abutilon cornutum, also known as the thorn apple or prickly calotrope, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Abutilon cornutum include its use as a diuretic and its ability to lower blood pressure, which is attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids in its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Abutilon cornutum include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent. Abutilon cornutum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
